3219230.name: Anomaly Clinic
3219230.description:
You are trapped in an endless British Clinic.
Observe your surroundings carefully to reach your appointment with Dr Ann O'Malley.

Keep an eye out for anomalies to reach your important appointment.
If you find anomalies, enter the lift on the left.
If you don't find anomalies, enter the lift on the right.

Anomaly Clinic is a short walking simulator inspired by British Hospitals, Exit 8, liminal spaces and back rooms.
The game is only available in English, but if you understand the above description of the anomaly, you can probably play it all the way through.

Features

  • A "Spot anomalies" game inspired by "The Exit 8".

  • Recreating the ambiance of a British Hospital.

  • A variety of interesting British characters.
